meta.name: A. A. M. Ashfatul Islam
meta.heroAbout: Frontend Developer focused on building responsive React interfaces, smooth user experiences, and production-ready web products.
meta.about: Frontend Developer with 3 years of experience building commercial web products using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, TypeScript, Next.js, and REST APIs. Primarily worked with Laravel teams, creating responsive, pixel-perfect HTML/CSS markup and integrating it into Laravel applications, while also contributing to a React-based commercial project. Converted 200+ Figma designs into production-ready interfaces and built the frontend markup for 6+ commercial applications from scratch. Outside of work, built multiple full-stack personal projects using React, Next.js 16, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS to strengthen modern frontend and full-stack development skills.

achievements.title: Frontend Ownership
achievements.description: Served as the sole frontend developer for nearly three years, building production-ready interfaces across 17+ SaaS, CodeCanyon, and client products.

achievements.title: Production UI Development
achievements.description: Converted 200+ Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect, production-ready user interfaces.

achievements.title: UI & API Execution
achievements.description: Integrated 30+ REST APIs and developed reusable React components for commercial web applications.

achievements.title: Modern Frontend Stack
achievements.description: Built modern web applications using React, Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Supabase, deployed on Vercel.

impact: Served as the sole frontend developer, independently managing all UI deliverables across the entire product portfolio.
Shipped production features across diverse domains — LMS, e-commerce, accounting, and legal — balancing new builds with legacy maintenance.
Delivered ~50 React screens for Marifa LMS with REST API integration, multilingual, and RTL support.
leadership: Built the entire React frontend for a Learning Management System (LMS) independently, converting provided Figma designs into production-ready user interfaces.
Worked closely with designers and backend engineers to deliver responsive interfaces and integrate backend APIs on schedule.

projects.description: Built the complete React frontend for a Learning Management System (LMS) from scratch, implementing quizzes, classes, courses, blogs, dashboards, authentication, and API-driven user workflows.

projects.name: Lawcham
projects.description: Built production-ready frontends for both SaaS and single-user applications by converting Figma designs into responsive user interfaces with reusable components.

responsibilities: Built reusable React components for commercial web applications.
Translated 200+ Figma designs into responsive interfaces using React, JavaScript, SCSS, and Laravel Blade.
Integrated 30+ REST APIs using React Query, Context API, Axios, and React Hook Form.
Implemented multilingual, RTL, semantic HTML, and cross-browser support.
Optimized performance with lazy loading, code splitting, and memoization.
